mapper.select: SELECT RI.REVIEW_IMAGE_ID, RI.REVIEW_ID, RI.IMAGE FROM REVIEW_IMAGE RI WHERE RI.REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId} ORDER BY RI.REVIEW_IMAGE_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COURSE ( USER_ID, COURSE_NAME, DISTANCE, TYPE, IS_PUBLIC, START_LOCATION, START_POINT, END_POINT, ROUTE_LINE ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{courseName}, #{distance}, #{type}, 0, #{startLocation}, ST_GeomFromText(#{startPoint}, 4326), ST_GeomFromText(#{endPoint}, 4326), ST_GeomFromText(#{routeLine}, 4326) )
mapper.select:
SELECT C.COURSE_ID, C.USER_ID, C.COURSE_NAME, C.DISTANCE, C.TYPE, C.IS_PUBLIC, C.START_LOCATION, ST_AsText(C.START_POINT) AS START_POINT_WKT, ST_AsText(C.END_POINT) AS END_POINT_WKT, ST_AsText(C.ROUTE_LINE) AS ROUTE_LINE_WKT, R.AVG_RATING AS AVG_RATING
FROM COURSE C
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COURSE_ID, AVG(REVIEW_RATING) AS AVG_RATING FROM REVIEW /* 필요시 여기서 삭제된 후기(IS_DELETE 등) 제외 조건 추가 */ GROUP BY COURSE_ID ) R ON R.COURSE_ID = C.COURSE_ID
WHERE C.COURSE_ID = #{courseId}
SELECT CP.COURSE_ID, ST_AsText(CP.LOCATION) AS LOCATION_WKT, CP.DATE_TIME FROM COURSE_PATH CP WHERE CP.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} ORDER BY CP.DATE_TIME ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO COURSE_PATH ( COURSE_ID, DATE_TIME, LOCATION ) VALUES
( #{courseId}, #{path.dateTime}, ST_GeomFromText(#{path.location}, 4326) )
mapper.select: SELECT C.COURSE_ID, C.USER_ID, C.COURSE_NAME, C.DISTANCE, C.TYPE, C.IS_PUBLIC, ST_AsText(C.START_POINT) AS START_POINT_WKT, ST_AsText(C.END_POINT) AS END_POINT_WKT, ST_AsText(C.ROUTE_LINE) AS ROUTE_LINE_WKT FROM COURSE C WHERE C.COURSE_ID = #{courseId}

SELECT C.COURSE_ID, C.USER_ID, C.COURSE_NAME, C.DISTANCE, C.TYPE, C.IS_PUBLIC, C.START_LOCATION, ST_AsText(C.START_POINT) AS START_POINT_WKT, ST_AsText(C.END_POINT) AS END_POINT_WKT, ST_AsText(C.ROUTE_LINE) AS ROUTE_LINE_WKT, IFNULL(R.AVG_RATING, 0) AS AVG_RATING FROM COURSE C
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COURSE_ID, AVG(REVIEW_RATING) AS AVG_RATING FROM REVIEW GROUP BY COURSE_ID ) R ON R.COURSE_ID = C.COURSE_ID
WHERE C.IS_PUBLIC = 1 ORDER BY AVG_RATING DESC, C.COURSE_ID DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT CASE WHEN ST_Distance( C.ROUTE_LINE, ST_GeomFromText(#{currentLocationWkt}, 4326) ) <= #{radius} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM COURSE C WHERE C.COURSE_ID = #{courseId}
SELECT CASE WHEN ST_Distance_Sphere( C.END_POINT, ST_GeomFromText(#{currentLocationWkt}, 4326, 'axis-order=long-lat') ) <= #{radius} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM COURSE C WHERE C.COURSE_ID = #{courseId}

SELECT V.REVIEW_ID, V.COURSE_ID, V.USER_ID, V.NICKNAME, V.REVIEW_CONTENT, V.REVIEW_DATE, V.REVIEW_RATING, V.AVATAR_IMG, V.LEVEL_ICON, RI.REVIEW_IMAGE_ID, RI.IMAGE AS REVIEW_IMAGE FROM REVIEW_VIEW V LEFT JOIN REVIEW_IMAGE RI ON V.REVIEW_ID = RI.REVIEW_ID WHERE V.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} ORDER BY V.REVIEW_DATE DESC, V.REVIEW_ID DESC, RI.REVIEW_IMAGE_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW ( COURSE_ID, USER_ID, WORKRECORD_ID, REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_DATE, REVIEW_RATING ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{userId}, #{workRecordId}, #{reviewContent}, #{reviewDate}, #{reviewRating} )
mapper.select: SELECT REVIEW_ID FROM REVIEW WHERE COURSE_ID = #{courseId} ORDER BY REVIEW_RATING DESC, REVIEW_DATE DESC, REVIEW_ID DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT V.REVIEW_ID, V.COURSE_ID, V.USER_ID, V.NICKNAME, V.REVIEW_CONTENT, V.REVIEW_DATE, V.REVIEW_RATING, V.AVATAR_IMG, V.LEVEL_ICON, RI.REVIEW_IMAGE_ID, RI.IMAGE AS REVIEW_IMAGE FROM REVIEW_VIEW V LEFT JOIN REVIEW_IMAGE RI ON V.REVIEW_ID = RI.REVIEW_ID WHERE V.REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId} ORDER BY RI.REVIEW_IMAGE_ID ASC
